auth_notes: Authentication is handled via a Bearer Token passed in the Authorization header. Keys are generated within the Referral Factory dashboard under Settings.
rate_limits: Typically 60 requests per minute, though this varies based on the specific subscription plan.
gotchas: Webhook signatures should be verified to ensure data integrity, which requires a Crypto node in n8n.
The API uses specific Campaign IDs that must be hardcoded or dynamically fetched before adding users.
Rate limiting errors (429) do not always return a 'Retry-After' header.
research_notes: Implementation requires the HTTP Request node. Users must manually map JSON bodies for POST requests to add participants. Webhooks are configured in the Referral Factory UI to point to the n8n Webhook node URL. Data transformation via the 'Set' or 'Code' node will be necessary to handle the nested JSON responses typical of their API.

effort_recommendation.rationale: Implementation requires the HTTP Request node. Users must manually map JSON bodies for POST requests to add participants. Webhooks are configured in the Referral Factory UI to point to the n8n Webhook node URL. Data transformation via the 'Set' or 'Code' node will be necessary to handle the nested JSON responses typical of their API.
